dct_description_sm: Depths shown by soundings; relief by countours, hachures, and spot heights.
Tidal Information table, 2 inset charts, list of objects "conspicuous to the Navigator."
Shows low water areas, reefs, roads, city plan, railways, vegetation, ports.
Map in English; responsibility, publication, etc. in Japanese; title and map information in Japanese and English.
Japan Hydrographic Department seal in upper left margin.
[Inset 1] : Calliope Dock and approaches : [Scale] 1:3,000 -- [Inset 2] : Auckland Wharves : [Scale] 1:7,500
